lines.text: All-knowing and all-powerful Sentinel, please bless me with smooth sailing tomorrow!
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow

lines.text: Grandma, how can you say such a disrespectful thing in front of the Sentinel!
lines.quest_name: Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow
Hymn of the Sea of Clouds: Rainbow
